failed_attempts.sql: WITH publications AS (SELECT p.id AS profile_id, pr.edge, pub.published_at FROM publication pub JOIN profile_relationship pr ON pub.profile_id = pr.destination_profile_id WHERE edge = 'follows' AND published_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month') SELECT pp.profile_id, pub.slug, pub.description, description_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'Critic') AS match, ts_rank(description_lexemes || biography_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'critic')) as relevance FROM publications pub, LATERAL (SELECT p.id AS profile_id, p.biography, r.profile_id FROM profile p JOIN profile_relationship r ON (p.id = r.origin_profile_id OR p.id = r.destination_profile_id) WHERE publication_id IN (SELECT id FROM publications)) pp ORDER BY relevance DESC LIMIT 10;
